_comment: Template for deployment config. Copy to dev.json / prod.json and fill in the values. Fields marked OPTIONAL can be omitted — defaults are shown.

deploymentConfig._comment_deploymentAzAuth: Azure authentication. Use 'AzureCli' for local dev (requires 'az login'). For CI/CD, provide ClientSecret fields:
deploymentConfig._comment_volumeCatalog: Unity Catalog catalog for job resource volumes. Default: 'lakehouse' (prod) or '<stage>_lakehouse' (dev/qual).
deploymentConfig._comment_volumeSchema: Schema in the Unity Catalog volume path. Default: 'default'. Typically set to your user ID for dev.
deploymentConfig._comment_targetMode: 'production' (default) or 'development'. Development mode omits run_as so the job runs as the deploying identity.
deploymentConfig._comment_clusterConfiguration: All sub-fields are optional with defaults. The entire block can be omitted.
deploymentConfig._comment_schedules: Per-catalog cron schedules, keyed by catalog name (e.g. 'sr', 'dm_md'). Catalogs without an entry are unscheduled.
deploymentConfig._comment_permissions: Target-level permissions applied to all resources in the bundle. Omit to deploy without extra permissions.
